name: Loki Prime
description: Confuse, deceive and destroy with Loki Prime. Featuring altered mod polarities for greater customization.
passiveDescription: Able to hang from walls |MULT|x longer than normal.

abilities.name: Decoy
abilities.description: Loki deploys a holographic copy of himself that draws enemy fire and absorbs a portion of nearby enemy health and shields.

abilities.name: Invisibility
abilities.description: Loki camouflages himself, becoming invisible to enemies.

abilities.name: Switch Teleport
abilities.description: Loki instantaneously swaps positions with a target, confusing the enemy.

abilities.name: Radial Disarm
abilities.description: Lets forth a wave of energy, disrupting the projectile weapons of enemies in range and forcing them to revert to melee combat.

components.name: Blueprint
components.description: Confuse, deceive and destroy with Loki Prime. Featuring altered mod polarities for greater customization.

components.name: Chassis
components.description: Chassis component of the Loki Prime Warframe.

components.name: Neuroptics
components.description: Neuroptics component of the Loki Prime Warframe.

components.name: Orokin Cell
components.description:
Ancient energy cell from the Orokin era.

Location: Ceres, Saturn, and Deimos

components.name: Systems
components.description: Systems component of the Loki Prime Warframe.

patchlogs.name: Echoes of Veilbreaker: Update 32.1
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed script error with Loki’s Invisibility.

patchlogs.name: Veilbreaker: Update 32
patchlogs.changes:
In Update 31.2, we buffed a number of underused Warframe augments. The time has come to continue this work! This batch tackles Warframes from Loki to Rhino (of which there are surprisingly many!). We have increased their viability in missions, which we hope will  encourage more build diversity.
Now: Offers half the invulnerability time for Loki, and cleanses status on both targets when switching. 
Also added a HUD icon for invulnerability time for Loki when switching to an enemy.
Loki (Earth to Mars)

patchlogs.name: Nora’s Mix Vol.2: Hotfix 31.6.4
patchlogs.changes: Swapped the Frost Specter (Earth-Mars) and Loki Specter (Uranus-Neptune).

patchlogs.name: Echoes of the Zariman: Update 31.6
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed issues with enemy FX shortly after using Loki’s Switch Teleport.

patchlogs.name: Nora's Mix Volume 1: Update 31.2.0 + 31.2.0.1
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed ranged enemies disarmed by Loki also losing their Melee weapons on recast.

patchlogs.name: Update 31: The New War
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Disarming an enemy who is held by Xaku Gaze, Loki Radial Disarm, Baruuk Desolate Hands & Serene Storm, Naramon Disarming Blast, Mag Magnetized Discharge Augment, or Kubrow Neutralize results in them counting as a required kill for mission progress.

patchlogs.name: Nights of Naberus: Hotfix 30.8.2
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed disarming a Deimos Tendril Drone with Loki's Disarm or with a Halikar, resulting in a floating shock baton appearing above the enemy.

patchlogs.name: Nidus Prime & Plague Star: Hotfix 30.7.2
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed an extremely precise Loki Switch Teleport on the Plague Star Escort Drone resulting in ability to skip most of the third Bounty stage wherein players were sending the Drone off-navigation into a Sniper Tower as an exploit.

patchlogs.name: Sisters of Parvos: Hotfix 30.5.1
patchlogs.fixes: This should resolve issues with Ivara’s Prowl, Loki’s Hushed Invisibility, Banshee’s passive

patchlogs.name: Gara Prime: Hotfix 30.3.5
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Tyro Battalyst's disarm behavior; they don't actually support this so it would generate a script error in a variety of cases (ie Loki’s Radial Disarm, Xaku’s Grasp of Lokh, etc).

patchlogs.name: Gara Prime: Hotfix 30.3.2
patchlogs.fixes:
Fixed missing "Toggle Prime Details" option with the Loki Verv Skin.
Fixed bad Syandana placements on the Loki Verv Skin.

patchlogs.name: Heart of Deimos: Update 29.1.0
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Loki’s Invisibility ability aggressively color grading your surroundings

patchlogs.name: Derelict Shift: Update 28.3.0
patchlogs.changes: Made Loki's decoy more visible with darker Energy colors and will now use secondary Energy colors.

patchlogs.name: Warframe Revised: Railjack Revisited (Part 1): Update 27.4
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Loki Dojo statues having a different material on its head than on its body.

patchlogs.name: Warframe Revised: Update 27.2.0
patchlogs.changes:
Loki: 65 to 100
Loki Prime: 65 to 125

patchlogs.name: TennoGen & Nightwave Episode 5: Hotfix 25.7.8
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed the Loki Jotunheim Skin not applying chosen Energy color.

patchlogs.name: Prime Vault: Hotfix 25.7.4 + 25.7.4.1
patchlogs.changes: Sniper scopes and Mining will no longer show the player if they're cloaked and zooming in (Loki’s Invisibility etc).
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Akarius ammo parts not hiding with invisible frames (Loki, Ivara, etc).

patchlogs.name: Saint of Altra: Update 25.7.0
patchlogs.fixes:
Fixed Ghouls, Ratel, and Wolf of Saturn Six targeting your Sentinel when it and you are both invisible (eg: Ivara's Prowl, Loki’s Invisibility, etc.).
Fixed a collapsing texture on Loki Prime’s Helmet. As reported here: https://forums.warframe.com/topic/1118949-loki-prime-collapsing-spot-on-the-helmet-missing-tennobet/

patchlogs.name: Tenno Reinforcements: Update 25.4.0
patchlogs.changes: Improved teleporting volumes spaces in the Corpus Outpost and Grineer Shipyard tilesets to catch overzealous Loki / Novas when attempting to escape the level.

patchlogs.name: The Jovian Concord: Hotfix 25.1.2 + 25.1.2.1
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed casting a headless Loki Decoy if the Loki Erebus Helmet equipped.

patchlogs.name: The Jovian Concord: Update 25.1.0
patchlogs.changes: Demolysts can no longer be disarmed by the Halikar, as they stop attacking the Conduit. This follows precedent with Demolysts already being immune to the effects of Loki's and Mesa's disarm abilities.

patchlogs.name: Plains of Eidolon Remaster: Update 24.6.0
patchlogs.changes: Loki Radial Disarm

patchlogs.name: Buried Debts: Update 24.5.0
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed part of the Capture FX not appearing correctly if you were invisible (with Loki, for instance, the sparks wouldn't be directed into his hands).

patchlogs.name: Fortuna: Hotfix 24.1.2 + 24.1.2.1
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed areas where Loki could Switch Teleport out of Orb Vallis.

patchlogs.name: Fortuna: Update 24.1.0 - TennoGen Round 14
patchlogs.changes: Loki Lupu Helmet by LuboxNekros Charon Helmet by malayu and Scharkie

patchlogs.name: Fortuna: Hotfix 24.0.9
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed certain MOA Companion parts not turning invisible when cloaked with a Warframe ability (i.e. Loki’s Invisibility, Ash’s Smokescreen, etc).

patchlogs.name: Fortuna: Hotfix 24.0.4
patchlogs.fixes: More fixes towards Loki Switch Teleport being able to kick other players off of K-Drives.

patchlogs.name: Fortuna: Hotfix 24.0.2
patchlogs.changes: Fixed Loki being able to Switch Teleport other players off their K-Drive and ride off into the snowy abyss while they cry in the snow.

patchlogs.name: The Sacrifice: Update 23.1.0: TennoGen Round 13
patchlogs.changes: Loki Kodama Skin by HitsuSan

patchlogs.name: The Sacrifice: Hotfix 23.0.6
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed the Oblivia Prime Syandana sitting too high up on Loki Prime.

patchlogs.name: Beasts of the Sanctuary: Update 22.20.0
patchlogs.changes: Use Loki’s Switch Teleport on the Pilot, leaving him grounded and confused:
patchlogs.fixes:
Fixed missing localization text on the Loki Prime Glyphs. 
Fixed a script error with Loki’s Invisibility.

patchlogs.name: Beasts of the Sanctuary: Update 22.19.0
patchlogs.changes: Loki Erebus Skin by Vulbjorn, the graphical walrus.

patchlogs.name: Beasts of the Sanctuary: Hotfix 22.18.8
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed the Loki Prime Glyphs description being unlocalized.

patchlogs.name: Shrine of the Eidolon: Update 22.15.0
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed headshot and kill sounds being occluded during Loki’s Invisibility and Ivara’s Prowl abilities.

patchlogs.name: Shrine of the Eidolon: Update 22.12.0
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed the Asita Rakta Syandana clipping into Loki Primes back when equipped.

patchlogs.name: Plains of Eidolon: Hotfix 22.11.1
patchlogs.changes:
Manipulate, incinerate and shatter your enemies with this Prime Vault Unsealed. The Prime Vault is open now on all platforms and brings back Loki Prime, Ember Prime and Frost Prime for a limited time. Returning with them are other high-demand Vaulted Prime Accessories and Weapons along with discounted Platinum in four unique packs: the Loki & Ember Dual Prime Pack, the Loki Deception Prime Pack, the Ember Fire Prime Pack, and the Frost Ice Prime Pack: https://www.warframe.com/prime-vault
Ember Prime, Frost Prime, Loki Prime, Wyrm Prime, Bo Prime, Sicarus Prime, Glaive Prime, Latron Prime, and Reaper Prime Relics have been added as Cetus Bounty rewards for a limited time. You can also find these limited Vaulted Relics in Relic Packs from the Market or as Syndicate rewards.
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed script error causing permanent Invisibility for Loki if the Invisibility expires while using Operator.

patchlogs.name: Plains of Eidolon: Hotfix 22.10.3
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Loki Decoy kills counting towards your score in Conclave.

patchlogs.name: Plains of Eidolon: Update 22.10.0
patchlogs.changes: Increased the Health of the Loki Specter in the Neptune Junction on Uranus.

patchlogs.name: Plains of Eidolon: Hotfix 22.2.5
patchlogs.changes: Tweaked the appearance of the Operator’s Void Mode to differentiate it from Loki’s Invisibility. This also applies to Unairu’s Void Shadow so you can identify that the cloak is from the Operator.

patchlogs.name: Warframe Update 22: Plains of Eidolon
patchlogs.changes: Loki's Decoy duration reduced to 6 seconds in Conclave.
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed using Loki's Switch Teleport in mid-air causing teleported enemies to float mid-air until the ability animation was complete.

patchlogs.name: Chains of Harrow: Hotfix 21.1.1
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed enemies affected by Nyx’s Chaos, Loki’s Radial Disarm, Naramon Mind Spike as well as Radiation procs not taking increased damage from faction damage Mods.

patchlogs.name: Chains of Harrow: Hotfix 21.0.7
patchlogs.changes: Updated the Frost Zastruga Helmet, Ersatz Loki Helmet, and Zener Volt Skin at each creator’s request.

patchlogs.name: Update 21: Chains of Harrow
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Repala Syandana clipping through Loki’s arms.

patchlogs.name: Octavia's Anthem: Hotfix 20.0.7
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Loki’s Radial Disarm not properly affecting Sentients in the Octavia’s Anthem quest.

patchlogs.name: Octavia's Anthem: Update 20
patchlogs.changes: Loki's Radial Disarm damage increased and split 60% Impact and 40% Energy Drain in Conclave.
patchlogs.fixes:
Fixed Loki losing active Invisibility after Transferring to and from the Operator.
Fixed the asymmetry of the Naberus Shoulder Armor on Loki’s Knave Deluxe skin.

patchlogs.name: The Glast Gambit: Hotfix 19.11.1
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed the Arcturus Syandana floating when equipped on Loki Prime with a Default Loki Skin.

patchlogs.name: The Glast Gambit: Hotfix 19.5.4
patchlogs.changes:
Codex scanner sounds can now be heard while using Loki’s Invisibility.
Loki’s Invisibility will now properly reduce the volume of some background sounds.
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed a script error caused by Loki’s Switch Teleport ability.

patchlogs.name: The War Within: Update 19.4 + 19.4.1
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Loki’s Invisibility while switching to Operator

patchlogs.name: The War Within: Update 19.2.0
patchlogs.changes:
Loki’s Decoy
Fixed a localization tag showing when Loki’s Deceptive Bond Decoy Augment activates.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 19.0.3
patchlogs.changes: Fixed Loki's Invisibility visual effects appearing as a bubble rather than a silhouette of Loki.

patchlogs.name: Update 19: The War Within
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed being able to collect an infinite amount of Energy Orbs even when Max Energy has been reached with Loki/Nova Prime and a maxed rank Primed Flow equipped as per: https://forums.warframe.com/topic/700300-consuming-energy-orbs-even-with-full-energy/

patchlogs.name: Recurring Dreams + Hotfix 1
patchlogs.changes: Loki’s Invisibility is now removed when he deals damage in Conclave. *This was noted in The Index Preview update, but didn’t end up functioning properly.

patchlogs.name: Recurring Nightmares
patchlogs.changes: Adjusted positioning of the Pyra Prime Syandana for Loki Prime and on Saryn Orphid skin.

patchlogs.name: The Index Preview
patchlogs.changes:
Conclave Arsenal now has Ability descriptions specific to Conclave for the following Frames: Ash, Banshee, Hydroid, Inaros, Ivara, Loki, Mag, Mesa, Nekros, Nezha, Nova, Nyx, Rhino, Saryn, Titania, Valkyr, Vauban and Volt.
Loki’s Decoy now deploys with only his Primary weapon in Conclave.
Loki’s Invisibility is now removed when he deals damage in Conclave.
Optimized Loki’s Radial Disarm and Irradiating Disarm Augment Mod to smooth out frame-rate issues.

patchlogs.name: The Vacuum Within
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed being able keep the hijack buttons in The Law of Retribution pressed indefinitely using Loki's Decoy and then re-casting somewhere else.

patchlogs.name: The Silver Grove: U1.2 + U1.3
patchlogs.changes: Loki will no longer gain energy from orbs while his Invisibility is active in Conclave.

patchlogs.name: The Silver Grove
patchlogs.changes:
Reduced the damage it takes to remove Invisibility from Loki in Conclave
Loki’s Radial Disarm now drains Energy and deactivates any active Abilities on target instead of Health/Shield in Conclave
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Loki’s Disarm not working for Junction Specters against players.

patchlogs.name: Specters of the Rail: U2.1
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed a crackling noise when firing the Latron Wraith while using Loki’s Invisibility or Ivara’s Prowl.

patchlogs.name: Specters of the Rail: Hotfix 11
patchlogs.changes: Fixed Radial Disarm script error if Loki died and respawned while it was active, causing the effect to be permanent until death in Conclave.

patchlogs.name: Update: Specters of the Rail
patchlogs.changes: Reduced the duration of Loki’s Decoy in Conclave.
patchlogs.fixes:
Loki*: 175 Platinum
Fixed fist weapons being placed on the floor of the Arsenal when equipped on Loki's Knave skin.
Fixed issues with Loki's Switch Teleport still allowing players to get stuck in walls.

patchlogs.name: Update 18.14.0 + 18.14.0.1 + 18.14.1
patchlogs.fixes: •    Fixed casting Loki’s Radial Disarm increasing the number of enemies by 1.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 18.13.2
patchlogs.fixes:
Fixed Loki's Radial Disarm increasing the number of enemies when cast in Kela De Thaym’s Arena.
Fixed Loki’s incorrect passive description.

patchlogs.name: Update 18.12.0: Vauban Prime & 18.12.1
patchlogs.changes: •    Loki Prime, Bo Prime, and Wyrm Prime have been removed from the Void and put into the Prime Vault until further notice.

patchlogs.name: Update 18.9.0
patchlogs.changes: •    Fixed Loki getting stuck behind a laser gate by Switch Teleporting behind it in Conclave.

patchlogs.name: Update 18.8.0
patchlogs.fixes: •    Fixed rendering Ambulas defenseless from casting Loki’s Switch Teleport.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 18.6.3
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Loki’s Decoy spawning with no head, weapon or customization when spawning in the Dojo’s dueling room.

patchlogs.name: Update 18.6
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Loki’s Switch Teleport occasionally allowing players to be teleported into walls.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 18.5.5 + 18.5.5.1
patchlogs.changes: •    Loki will no longer be able to complete the Mastery Rank 10-11 test by Switch Teleporting to the end. (What a trickster!)

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 18.5.1
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Loki’s Radial Disarm not functioning on Hyekka Masters.

patchlogs.name: Update 18.5: Sands of Inaros
patchlogs.fixes:
Loki Decoy Conclave Augment 
 50% of damage Loki takes is transferred to Decoy, and vice versa.
Increased the range and damage of Loki's Radial Disarm in Conclave.
Loki’s Radial Disarm will no longer be able to disarm, stun or dismember boss-type enemies.
Loki’s Irradiating Disarm Augment will no longer be able to confuse boss-type enemies.
Fixed Loki being able to get stuck between invisible walls on the Orokin Moon tilesets debris after using Switch Teleport.
Fixed multiple Syandanas not sitting properly on Loki Prime when wearing the Knave skin.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 18.4.7
patchlogs.fixes:
Fixed Loki’s Decoy doing being able to do excessive damage when disarmed in a Clan Dojo, when two Loki’s are dueling.
Fixed Loki’s Knave Skin not having the proper offset for thrown weapons.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 18.4.6
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Limbo’s Rift visual FX that display on a target improperly displaying on a stealthed Loki.

patchlogs.name: Update 18.4.0
patchlogs.changes: Conclave Mod 'Plan B' will no longer activate when killing Loki's Decoy.

patchlogs.name: Update 18.3
patchlogs.changes: Fixed ‘On Kill’ conditions on Conclave Mods triggering from destroying Loki’s Decoy.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 18.1.3
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed an error causing Loki to slowly decapitate in the Loki Deluxe Skin Bundle Diorama.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 18.0.8
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Loki’s Decoy spawning as hostile to Loki, with the intent to kill its creator in Conclave.

patchlogs.name: Update 18: The Second Dream
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed a hitch that would occur with Loki's Radial Disarm

patchlogs.name: Update 17.12.0
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed some instances where Loki could exit terrain via switch teleport.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 17.8.1
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed players becoming staggered when being released from a friendly Loki’s Switch Teleport.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 17.6.1
patchlogs.changes: Reduced the duration and amount of damage Loki’s Invisibility can take before it breaks in PvP.
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed headshots / kill FX not properly displaying when slain by Loki during Invisibility, or during cabin depressurization.

patchlogs.name: Update 17.5: The Jordas Precept. + Hotfix 17.5.1
patchlogs.changes: Trinity, Nova, Loki and Banshee can now be used in Conclave.

patchlogs.name: Update 17.4.0
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Loki and Ash being unable to damage themselves with explosive weapons while invisible.

patchlogs.name: Update 17.3.0
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Loki’s Switch Teleport being able to pull players in Archwing out of water.

patchlogs.name: Update 17.2.4
patchlogs.changes: Loki's Radial Disarm now knocks enemies off emplacements when cast instead of destroying them.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 17.0.3
patchlogs.changes:
Loki, Loki Prime and all of Loki’s alternate helmets have received a PBR upgrade.  This visual overhaul is the first major step in bringing older Warframes up to date with new PBR textures and does come with a few additional features we hope to roll out to other Warframes over time.  Let us know what you think of the changes!
Loki Prime’s gold trim is now tintable.
Loki’s Switch Teleport will no longer teleport targets if it cannot validly switch their position.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 16.5.8
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Loki and Loki Prime’s Decoy not firing his pistol.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 16.5.6
patchlogs.changes: Loki’s Invisibility, when used with a Sentinel, will now give the Sentinel its proper energy color.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 16.5.4
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Loki’s Invisibility not being affected by energy colors as per: https://forums.warframe.com/index.php?/topic/457479-lokis-invisibility-doesnt-get-affected-to-your-energy-colors-and-others/

patchlogs.name: Update 16.3: The New Protocols
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed issue that would cause Loki’s Invisibility texture to fill the entire screen as per: https://forums.warframe.com/index.php?/topic/435669-loki-invisibility-texture-filling-entire-screen-glitch/

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 16.1.1
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Loki default helmet appearing as Prime version in Void.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 16.0.1
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Loki’s Invisibility creating particle effects for every equipped attachment.

patchlogs.name: Warframe: Sanctuary
patchlogs.fixes:
Fixed Loki`s Decoy showing broken decorations or special effects.
Fixed Loki`s switch teleport being able to get him stuck into the wall.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 15.13.1
patchlogs.fixes: * Fixed issues with Syandana placement on Loki Prime.

patchlogs.name: Update 15.13
patchlogs.changes: Removed the white flash that occurs when transitioning into Loki’s Invisibility.

patchlogs.name: Update 15.9
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed enemies immune to Warframe abilities still being affected by Loki’s Irradiating Disarm Augment Mod.

patchlogs.name: Update 15.3.0
patchlogs.changes: Loki’s Decoy now has an ability timer.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 14.10.3
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed an issue with Loki being able to switch teleport Dark Sector defense pods.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 14.9.1
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Loki Enigma profile icon packs giving players a Locust Ash profile icon instead – we believe this was an organized prank by our stealthy frames.

patchlogs.name: Update 14.8.0: Nyx Prime
patchlogs.additions: Added in missing idle animations for Loki, Mirage, and Nova (noble). When inactive for a few seconds, each of these frames will now have idles!

patchlogs.name: Update 14.5: Operation Cryotic Front!
patchlogs.fixes: • Fixed Infested Ancients and Grineer Scorpions from using their grapple pull ability on Saryn's Molt avatar and Loki's Decoy avatar as it would not behave well (would have them pause for a few moments, if Molt was used again it would script error and break the enemy). This also fixes a similar issue with Vay Hek’s beam-zap attack.

patchlogs.name: Update 14: The Mad Cephalon
patchlogs.changes:
Loki Prime's decoy now holds a Lex Prime!
Tweaked the Bow Idle animations on Loki, Mag, Valkyr, and Hydroid Warframes.
Improved the cast sound effect for Loki's Radial Disarm ability.
Tweaked the sound effect for Loki’s Decoy cast and spawn in sound effects.
Loki's Decoy ability deploy sound effect is now positional and will not be heard by players past a certain distance.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 13.9.1
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed an issue with Shadow of the Dead clones spawning with no weapons if they were originally killed after being disarmed by Loki.

patchlogs.name: Update 13.7.0 + 13.7.0.1: Depths Of The Void
patchlogs.additions:
New Prime Gear has been discovered in the Void:Loki Prime!
OR Loki Prime Access is available now!
patchlogs.fixes:
Fixed duplicate Loki Prime Codex entry.
Fixed Loki Prime crafting casting 10 Argon Crystal, it is now 1 Orokin Cell for full frame.
Fixed Loki Prime not coming with Ability Mods.

patchlogs.name: 13.4.0: Serro + Psa!
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed an issue with Loki's Disarm ability breaking Vor's death animation.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 13.2.2+13.2.2.1
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed an issue with Sentinel working incorrectly after being hit by an Enemy Loki's Radial Disarm.

patchlogs.name: Update 13.1.0: Amprex
patchlogs.fixes: Loki's invisibility will now be canceled when the player is downed.

patchlogs.name: Update 13: Dark Sectors
patchlogs.changes:
Tweaked the cast sounds of multiple frames including Zephyr, Loki, and Excalibur.
Tweaked Loki's Invisibility enter sound.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 11.7.3
patchlogs.changes: Loki can no longer Switch-Teleport Raptor boss.

patchlogs.name: Update 11.6.0
patchlogs.changes: Loki’s Invisibility no longer reduces the volume of dialog and music.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 11.0.4
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Loki/Banshee Immortal skins not being tintable.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 11.0.3: Hotter Than Ruk’S Guns!
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed error with Loki's Radial Disarm that would cause power in use bug.

patchlogs.name: Update 10.5.0: The Gradivus Dilemma
patchlogs.changes: Fixed issue where destroying a Loki Decoy or Saryn Moult avatar would award players a kill in Conclave duels.

patchlogs.name: Update 10.4.0
patchlogs.changes: Fix for being able to escape Golem boss arena with Loki or Nova when mission is in progress.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 10.3.2
patchlogs.fixes: Orokin have adapted to  thwart trickster Loki's from switch teleporting into Vaults. Look trigger added for join in progress check.

patchlogs.name: Update 10.3.0: Hump Day!
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Loki’s Radial Disarm that was removing limbs from Infested Runners.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 9.5.1
patchlogs.changes: Fixed Lokis’ arm clipping,breaking,fusing,merging, etc. with Supra.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 9.3
patchlogs.fixes: Infested Ancient Loki Switch Teleport reaction animations, Mag Crush react animations, and stealth attacks.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 9.1.1
patchlogs.fixes: Fix for Loki Decoy putting Vor in an inactive state.

patchlogs.name: Update 7.11.0: Vauban!
patchlogs.fixes: Players using hacking terminals will not be affected by Mag's Pull power or Loki's Switch power.

patchlogs.name: Update 7.10.0: Weekend Extermination Event!
patchlogs.fixes:
Fixed bug where you could use Loki to Switch Teleport with a downed capture target.
Fixed Loki's Switch Teleport not working on Shockwave MOA.
Fixed Loki's Decoy power that would hang around after its creator left the game.

patchlogs.name: Update 7.9.0: The Glaive
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed the linking of Loki's Decoy and Switch Teleport powers that was causing avatars to sometimes fall outside the level.

patchlogs.name: Update 7.1 Hot-Fixes
patchlogs.fixes: -Fix Sentinel Cloak removed Ashes and Lokis cloaking abilities

patchlogs.name: Update 6.5 Hotfixes
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed an issue with Loki Switch Teleport breaking if a target dies at right moment.

patchlogs.name: Update 5.3 - "Blazing Embers"
patchlogs.additions: Warframe Blueprints for Excalibur, Volt and Loki.
